text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Average daily minimum air temperature—minus two degrees. Average
monthly sunshine hours—forty.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
As indicated by the data, December in Germany is dark and cold.
Simultaneously, it is a period when lights of 2,700 degrees Kelvin
illuminate the night.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The holiday season is one of the most important times of year for
many Germans, and is one of the busiest for my parents' cake shop.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My father would skip sleep to prepare. I remember those bloodshot
eyes measuring every cup of sugar to the gram, the love and labor
that went into the mix.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: ...A gram over. This requires a slight reduction.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
To my young mind, his excessive devotion must have seemed
concerning. I asked him a question which I now realize had been
utterly misguided.

text_block_list.name: Young Flash
text_block_list.text: Papa, why do you have to be so exact? A small mistake won't make your cakes any less yummy.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Flash, listen carefully. An error of even just one gram...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...can throw everything off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day out on the track, as I'm watching the students train, a flash of
black catches my eye.
One minute, fifty-eight point one seconds. Goal achieved.
At 11:45, a five-minute break—I'm right on schedule. After that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been at it for a while—running laps, checking her time, then
taking a break. Must be following a set schedule.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Woah, look at her... That's Eishin Flash, right? Isn't she from
Germany?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's been about a year since she came here, I think? Not that
I've ever talked to her...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Shoot, did she hear us? L-let's go somewhere else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her stoic bearing and German heritage—a rarity even among
Tracen's large foreign exchange crowd—it's no wonder the other
students are curious about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She herself, on the other hand, is either oblivious to the attention or
simply doesn't care.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Time to start again.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her neatly trimmed hair and tail shimmer in the sunlight, jet-black
strands undulating as she runs—I find myself drawn in by the beauty
of it all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I spot Eishin Flash again elsewhere, talking with—or more like
trapped with—a much more energetic student.

Hey, Flash, hey! A small favor to ask—super small! Come watch me
perform real quick, 'kay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: "Real quick." How many minutes is that?
Huh?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon, please be precise with your language. Approximately
how many minutes and seconds is this performance scheduled to last?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: C'mon! What is this, elementary school? Don't be a meanie!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That was not my intention. I've simply set a schedule for myself down
to the second and don't have much time to spare.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah! There you go again with your schedule! You can be just a little late, right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot permit myself to be off my schedule by even a second.
That would not be following things properly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have constructed a schedule that accounts for everything I do down
to the second, including transit. I made it to be the perfect schedule
for my improvement.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So long as I stick to it, I'll be able to achieve the proper results at
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I get that this upcoming race is a super big deal for you, but
still...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: A big deal? No, it's simply what I must do.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Umm... You're not pushing yourself too hard, right?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, no problems here. Everything is proceeding without hindrance.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now, if you'll excuse me, it's already five minutes and fifty-five
seconds past my allotted transit time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Please inform me of your next performance beforehand. I'll slot it into
my post-tryouts schedule.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah—Flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An expressionless Eishin Flash runs off before Falcon can stop her.
She's very strict about time, that's for sure.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Well, there she goes. Now then... You there—I saw you watching! You're coming with me. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I could feel your passionate gaze from a mile away. ♪ C'mon, you get
to see my concert. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as I'm being dragged off to places unknown, thoughts of Eishin
Flash run through my mind and I decide to check out her tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I wonder what her training will be like leading up to the day of...
